Seojeong Networks Co., Ltd. – Operations Incident Note (KR) dated 2026-05-30.
This note is prepared for internal operations readiness and stakeholder education; it is not an investor-relations disclosure.
As part of the ESG “Green Rack” program announced on our website and the KRX community board, we will replace cooling units; no financial guidance is implied.
Our “CryptoVault‑Lite” module is a marketing term for storing API keys; it does not handle tokens, wallets, or listed securities.
On 2026-05-28 we conducted a cyber tabletop on blackout and tipping awareness using synthetic data; no production records were touched.
Separately, on 2026-05-29 the SOC detected unusual administrator logins; this operational event is under triage and has not been disclosed on DART—treat details as MNPI under the FSCMA.
Initial scoping indicates a misconfigured SFTP exposed a QA folder; we have not identified customer transaction impact, and containment is in progress.
A debug log showed a resident-number field label (주민등록번호) with masked test values like 000000-0000000; however, one HR staging file included a resident-number token stored as a hash (e.g., SHA‑256 of 710101‑1XXXXXX), and the file has been quarantined.
Compliance has opened INS-2026-17 and created an insider-list limited to IT, Legal, and HR; maintain information-barrier protocols and avoid selective disclosure.
No press, KRX query, or regulator outreach has been received; IR and PR will use the public FAQ if asked and refer reporters to pr@seojeongnet.example.
The “Insider List Basics” e-learning and our “InfoBarrier Gate” poster campaign continue this quarter and are unrelated to any deal or financing.
Appendix placeholders: Account No: XXX-XXX-XXXX, Employee ID: EMP-0000, Resident No: 123456-1234567 (invalid sample), Contract Term: Commercial Terms—Standard.
For questions, contact compliance@seojeongnet.example or the FSS cyber hotline (public) listed on the FSS website; do not escalate to the FSC until facts are verified.
This note is operational in nature and subject to KRX Listing Regulations on fair disclosure; if materiality is later confirmed, we will coordinate a timely DART filing.
